title: Constitution of the Governing Board of Nalanda University Order (21 Nov. 2016)
description: Constitution of the Governing Board of Nalanda University Order (21 Nov. 2016)
text: 5428 GI/2016 (1) jftLVªh laö Mhö ,yö&33004@99 REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 2764] ubZ fnYyh] c`gLifrokj] uoEcj 24] 2016@vxzgk;.k 3] 1938 No. 2764] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 24, 2016/AGRAHAYANA 3, 1938 िवदेश मंᮢ ालय (नाल᭠दा ᮧभाग) आदे श नई ᳰद᭨ली, 21 नव᭥बर, 2016 का.आ.3533(अ).—भारत के माननीय रा᭬ᮝपित, नाल᭠दा िव᭫विव᳒ालय के िवि जटर कᳱ हैिसयत से, नाल᭠दा िव᭫विव᳒ालय अिधिनयम 2010 के खंड 7 के अनुसार त ᭜काल ᮧभाव से नाल᭠दा िव᭫विव᳒ालय शासी बोडᭅ का िन᭥नानुसार गठन ᳰकए जाने को अनुमोदन ᮧदान करते हᱹ: (क) कुलािधपित (ख) कुलपित (ग) सवᲃ᭒च योगदान करने वाले सद᭭य देशᲂ से पांच सद᭭य (i) भारत के ᮧितिनिध: ᮰ी एन. के. ᳲसह (ii) चीन के ᮧितिनिध (iii) ऑ᭭ᮝेिलया के ᮧितिनिध (iv) लाओ पीडीआर के ᮧितिनिध (v) थाईलᱹड के ᮧितिनिध (घ) सिचव (पूवᭅ), िवदेश मंᮢालय (ङ) िबहार सरकार के दो ᮧितिनिध (च) मानव संसाधन िवकास मंᮢालय, भारत सरकार का एक ᮧितिनिध (छ) “जाने-माने अकादमीिशयन अथवा िशᭃािवद” ᮰ेणी मᱶ िन᭥निलिखत तीन ᭪यि᭍त: (i) ᮧोफेसर अरᳲवद शमाᭅ, धाᳶमक अ᭟ययन संकाय, मैकिगल यूिनवᳶसटी, कनाडा -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] (ii) ᮧोफेसर लोकेश चंᮤा, अ᭟यᭃ भारतीय सां᭭कृितक संबंध पᳯरषद (iii) डॉ. अरᳲवद पनगिड़या, उपा᭟यᭃ, नीित आयोग । [सं. एस/321/27/2016] एस. िववेकानाथन, अवर सिचव (नाल᭠दा) MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS (NALANDA DIVISION) ORDER New Delhi, the 21st November, 2016 S.O. 3533(E).—The Hon’ble President of India, in his capacity as the Visitor of Nalanda University, is pleased to approve the following constitution of the Governing Board of Nalanda University, with immediate effect, in accordance with Clause 7 of the Nalanda University Act 2010: (a) Chancellor (b) Vice Chancellor (c) Five Members from Member countries with highest contribution: (i) Representative from India : Shri N.K. Singh (ii) Representative from China (iii) Representative from Australia (iv) Representative from Lao PDR (v) Representative from Thailand (d) Secretary (East), MEA (e) Two representatives from Government of Bihar (f) One representative from the Ministry of HRD, Govt. of India (g) Following three persons in the category of “renowned Academician or Educationist”: (i) Professor Arvind Sharma, Faculty of Religious Studies, McGill University, Canada (ii) Professor Lokesh Chandra, President, Indian Council for Cultural Relations. (iii) Dr. Arvind Panagariya, Vice Chairman, NITI Aayog. [No. S/321/27/2016] S. VIVEKANANTHAN, Under Secy. (Nalanda) Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
